jobs.title: Agile Business Analyst – ServiceNow Project
jobs.description:
This a Full Remote job, the offer is available from: Canada, California (USA)

Overview:

Job Title: Agile Business Analyst – ServiceNow Project

Location: Remote (Montréal, Quebec)
Contract Type: Long-term, ongoing contract
Language Requirement: Bilingual (French & English)

Overview

Our top client is seeking an Agile Business Analyst consultant to work remotely in Quebec on a long-term ServiceNow project. The consultant will play a key role in bridging business needs and ServiceNow capabilities, working closely with stakeholders, Product Owners, and technical teams in an Agile environment.

jobs.title: Senior Project Manager / Business Analyst - Consultant
jobs.description:
Who We Are

Liberum exists to deliver in the environments where most firms struggle. Our clients are public sector agencies navigating enterprise-scale transformations in politically complex, high-stakes environments where the margin for error is thin, and the consequences of failure are public. We believe clients deserve real ownership, not warm bodies and hope.
